title: Heroism applies AL Hit and Atk plus two while equipped

card.rawText: AL: +2. Hit: +2. Atk: +2. This card and the equipped creature are unaffected by magic cards. This card can only be negated when played.

plan.title: Heroism applies AL Hit and Atk plus two while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Heroism to a modifier-zero primary creature, verify AL gains +2, and run a battle to verify Hit and Atk gains +2.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Hit and Atk bonuses come only from Heroism.

steps: Player 1 plays Heroism and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +2 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm 093-E02 and 093-E03 separately: magic immunity and only-negatable-when-played are not covered by this stat fixture.
riskNotes: This fixture covers only Heroism's printed AL, Hit, and Atk bonuses.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
